title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: Date: 2026-06-05. Method: two independent reviewers analysed full codebase (app.R, global.R, R/*.R, test-smoke.R, PLAN.md, CLAUDE.md), debated consensus: Agent P — pragmatic maintainer, bias toward low-risk incremental change. Agent S — structural/design-first, willing argue deeper refactors. Every claim checked code least one reviewer (initial overstatements corrected debate — noted inline). document agreed plan, wish list.

title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: Tier 1 Tier 2 implemented, tested, committed main (parse-checked, 72/72 unit + filter-equivalence assertions green, app boots HTTP 200, key paths verified interactively). item marked ✅ commit subject. open question resolved: mtime cache key (raw files overwritten practice). Remaining ideas live future_work.md.

title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: architecture sound scope (single-user, local, raw visualisation ). load-bearing, easy--get-wrong parts — SerialParam + mzR--workers performance split, seconds-internally time discipline, ColorBrewer/viridis-colour, cache keying — already centralised respected. remaining debt ordinary duplication plus real test gap, two spots duplication latent correctness hazard rather style nit. reviewers explicitly declined structural rewrite. full “data-service accessor layer” S originally proposed withdrawn verifying rv “god-object” pain thinner looked: rv$filter constructed exactly one place (mod_filter.R:60-82) real leak plot modules two lines reading rv$filter$ms_level.

what: What is already good — do not touch
title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: Centralised performance contract. register(SerialParam()) global.R; mirai workers library(mzR); heavy Spectra/xcms work main process. whole performance story — -limits. Clean reactive graph composition root: included() → data_key() → raw_msexp() (cached) → dataset() → modules (app.R). Cache discipline: data_key() keyed path-set + filter; bindCache heavy reactives excludes cosmetic inputs. Edge discipline: seconds internally, conversion display/input edges; colours fct_palettes.R. Good existing primitives: mod_export (reusable, takes plot_gg reactive), zoom_keeper() (encapsulates hard-won plotly zoom-persistence trick — uirevision already tried hold zoom ). fct_*.R layer Shiny-free (input/output/rv references) — .e. testable core already isolated. just isn’t tested.

title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: item: effort (S/M/L) · risk (low/med/high) · definition done.

what: Tier 1 — do now (low-risk, additive, high value) — ✅ ALL DONE
title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: ✅ finalize_plotly(p, source, keep_zoom) helper — S · low. DoD: identical ggplotly → keep_zoom → 3× event_register chain (issue 1) one call 5 modules; app boots HTTP 200; zoom + click still work faahKO + msdata. wire_selection(source, plot_name) helper near-identical click→rv$selection handler can ride along. Done: added register_plotly_events / finalize_plotly / wire_selection; click→spectrum verified interactively. ✅ Filter-equivalence invariant test — M · low. single highest-value item. DoD: battery filter configs (ms_level, rt, mz, intensity, polarity, spectrum_id), spectra surviving apply_filters equal surviving apply_filters_spectra real msdata file. Folds old benchmarks/filter-test.R. Makes lock-step (issue 2) safe. Done: tests/test-filters.R. Note: implemented dependency-free runner (tests/run-tests.R), tests/testthat/ — testthat isn’t renv library app sourced, installed. (See future_work: “make R package” move testthat.) ✅ Single filter schema + make_filter() constructor — S/M · low-med. DoD: make_rv() mod_filter build filter one definition (issue 3). Done: empty_filter() + make_filter() fct_filters.R. ✅ Kill rv$filter$ms_level leak — S · low. DoD: single chrom_ms_level(filter) helper holds … else 1L default (issue 4); tic/eic longer read rv$filter$ms_level directly. Done. ✅ Tests pure helpers — S · low. DoD: covers rt round-trips, bin_peaks, combined_ranges, polarity_label, isTRUE_vec, scan-matching, palettes, filter helpers; test-smoke.R upgraded assert. Done: tests/test-helpers.R (+ smoke stopifnot). 72 assertions. ✅ Per-file error isolation multi-file extraction loops — S · low. DoD: one unreadable file skipped + reported instead aborting plot (issue 8). Done via purrr::possibly inside extract_over_files (item 8) — per request, possibly rather tryCatch. Verified bogus path. ✅ Repo hygiene — S · trivial. DoD: logs / *./ stray scripts git-ignored removed (issue 11). Done: already covered .gitignore; benchmarks/filter-test.R folded test suite removed.

what: Tier 2 — do opportunistically — ✅ ALL DONE (done now alongside Tier 1)
title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: ✅ extract_over_files(files_df, extractor, …) unification — M · low-med. DoD: triplicated per-file loop + round(rt,3) scan-join (issue 5) live one helper; map/precursors/spectrum call ; output identical real data. Done — also carries item-6 possibly isolation. ✅ Small shared helpers: new_eic_target() 3× append literal (issue 6); scan_for_rt() documenting 3-decimal rt contract — S · low. Done (scan_for_rt landed item 8; new_eic_target utils_reactive.R). ✅ Disable MS-map export button 3D modes — S · low. DoD: export hidden mode != "map" (narrow fix issue 10). Done via conditionalPanel. Full renderer unification stays declined. ✅ clear_caches() file-set change — S · low. DoD: .scan_cache/.spectra_cache emptied memory doesn’t grow (issue 9). Done: clear_ms_caches() called ingest “Clear ” handler (precise W5 gap), rather every include-toggle (thrash still-relevant per-path cache). ✅ Narrow settings observer — S · low. DoD: cosmetic change doesn’t fan beyond consumers. Done: rv$settings now nested reactiveValues (per-field reactivity) written per-field observeEvents — verified: switching time unit relabels axes without touching palette/export consumers.

title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: Full data-service accessor layer — payoff mostly aesthetic single-user local app; cost app-wide signature + test churn medium risk, unit-test layer (plot modules) least worth unit-testing. Replaced Tier-1 leak fix (item 4). reviewers. Generic plot-module factory / R6 / S7 class hierarchy / plugin registry — -engineering 5 fixed tabs; view real divergence (EIC target table, spectrum’s 3 layouts + scan-list modal, map’s 3 plotly-native modes). Extract shared tail, whole module. Plotly-map → ggplot renderer unification — two renderers intentional (interactive scattergl/surface can’t ggsaved; 3D can’t export static ggplot). Use item 10 instead. (path, mtime) cache key — see open question ; clear-(item 11) agreed default. Touching SerialParam + mzR--workers split, zoom_keeper/uirevision, seconds-internally rule, ColorBrewer constraint — locked, documented dogmas. -limits. Async-ifying heavy reads, state-management framework, DT-checkbox abstraction, swappable-backend layer — scope / speculative. Peak picking / grouping / alignment — deferred design (PLAN.md §16).

title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: caches additionally key file mtime? Agent P argued yes — overwriting file path (re-running acquisition lab box) serves stale spectra silently. Agent S argued — single-user local app user typed path isn’t rewriting files mid-session, non-event, clear--file-set-change (item 11) already bounds risk. Recommendation: ship clear-(item 11) now; add (path, mtime) keying user actually reports re-acquisition/overwrite workflow. Low stakes either way. ✅ RESOLVED (2026-06-05): user confirmed files rarely overwritten — mtime key. Clear-(item 11) shipped; mtime declined.

title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: ✅ Done — Tier 1 Tier 2 implemented order across separate parse-checked, test- smoke-verified commits main. Remaining ideas (R package, CI, Docker, persistent settings, default tol setting, CommonMZ/CAMERA, xcms objects, persistent cache) tracked future_work.md.

what: Spectra / xcms read performance — benchmark & root cause
title: Spectra / xcms read performance — benchmark & root cause
text: building xcmsVisGUI (interactive raw LC-MS viewer) hit catastrophic slowness reading real mzML files Spectra / xcms. note records benchmark root cause, discussion RforMassSpectrometry / XCMS authors. TL;DR: Spectra(MsBackendMzR()) xcms::chromatogram() take 80–150 s per operation 30 MB centroided mzML file — cost mzR /O. BiocParallel: MsBackendMzR::backendInitialize() reads per-file headers via bplapply(files, ..., BPPARAM = bpparam()), registered default bpparam() Windows SnowParam(workers = 6). call spawns tears 6-process socket cluster (every worker re-loading Bioc stack). Forcing SerialParam() drops operations 0.2–1.6 s — ~150–730× difference.

title: Spectra / xcms read performance — benchmark & root cause
text: Test file: 30 MB centroided, indexed, zlib-compressed mzML, 1814 MS1 spectra, median 1161 peaks/spectrum (human urine, LC-MS positive). Behaviour reproduces across 140 files dataset.

what: Raw mzR vs the Spectra layer (default BiocParallel)
title: Spectra / xcms read performance — benchmark & root cause
text: raw mzR reads entire file ~0.6 s; 80–93 s incurred purely Spectra/xcms construction path, paid every chromatogram() call.

title: Spectra / xcms read performance — benchmark & root cause
text: Rprof(line.profiling = TRUE) around Spectra(f, MsBackendMzR()) (total 109.7 s): ~99% time inside BiocParallel::bplapply → SnowParam cluster start (bpstart/bploop) worker management — .e. spawning socket cluster 6 workers initialise (load packages) — actual header read.
code: == top by SELF time ==                          self.time self.pct DeveloperInterface.R#122     79.04    72.08   # BiocParallel cluster mgmt SnowParam-class.R#243        29.36    26.77   # SnowParam workers  == top by TOTAL time == bplapply-methods.R#57       108.90    99.31 bpinit.R#47 / bploop.R#325   79.20    72.22 SnowParam-class.R#243        29.36    26.77

title: Spectra / xcms read performance — benchmark & root cause
text: Spectra/R/MsBackendMzR.R, backendInitialize: default bpparam() unstarted SnowParam, every bplapply call internal bpstart + bpstop (full cluster spawn + teardown). number files small (one), cluster-spawn overhead dwarfs work, repeated every Spectra()/chromatogram() call.
code: setMethod("backendInitialize", "MsBackendMzR",           function(object, files, ..., BPPARAM = bpparam()) {     # default = SnowParam(6)               ...               spectraData <- rbindlistWithRownames(                   bplapply(files, FUN = function(fl) {            # cluster spawned per call                       cbind(Spectra:::.mzR_header(fl), dataStorage = fl)                   }, BPPARAM = BPPARAM), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)               ...

title: Spectra / xcms read performance — benchmark & root cause
text: Default SerialParam() header reads (length(files) threshold) MsBackendMzR::backendInitialize — per-file header reads cheap rarely benefit freshly-spawned cluster. Document prominently interactive/Windows users register(SerialParam()) (use persistent/lightweight backend, e.g. mirai-based one) — default SnowParam re-spawns cluster per bplapply. Consider whether chromatogram() friends reuse single started cluster rather spawning one per call.

title: Spectra / xcms read performance — benchmark & root cause
text: GUI reads files directly mzR (openMSfile + header + peaks, ~0.6 s/file), caches result memory, computes TIC/BPC/EIC/MS-map/spectrum/precursors (manual EIC per xcms #809 discussion). sidesteps Spectra construction cost entirely. /upstream SnowParam default addressed, GUI move back onto Spectra/xcms/xcmsVis (regaining full filter set) registering SerialParam().

title: CLAUDE.md — working notes for xcmsVisGUI
text: Read changing anything. captures non-obvious decisions, performance traps, conventions codebase follows. Also read PLAN.md (original design), BENCHMARK.md (perf investigation), ARCHITECTURE_REVIEW.md (current architecture), pkgdown usage guide (vignettes/articles/usage.Rmd, user-facing behaviour).

title: CLAUDE.md — working notes for xcmsVisGUI
text: local desktop Shiny app interactively visualising raw LC-MS data (TIC/BPC, EICs, spectra, 2D/3D MS maps, DDA precursors). Single user, runs locally. Scope raw visualisation — peak picking / grouping / alignment (deferred; see PLAN.md §16).

title: CLAUDE.md — working notes for xcmsVisGUI
text: R: C:\Program Files\R\R-4.5.2\bin\Rscript.exe (PATH — call full path). now R package. R/ package code (loaded via namespace, Shiny-auto-sourced); app exported run_app(). Launch headless: Rscript -e "pkgload::load_all('.'); run_app(port=7799, launch.browser=FALSE)" (Rscript run.R, load_all’s + launches). Installed: xcmsVisGUI::run_app(). Tests (testthat, edition 3): Rscript -e "testthat::test_local('.')" (dev, load_all) R CMD check. Real-data tests (filter-equivalence + extraction smoke) SKIP msdata/faahKO absent. tests/testthat/ holds . changing imports/roxygen run Rscript -e "roxygen2::roxygenise()" regenerate NAMESPACE + man/. benchmarks/ holds throwaway timing/repro scripts; *.git-ignored. editing, ALWAYS: parse-check every R file (load_all), boot headless confirm HTTP 200, committing. Test plot/extraction logic real data — never assume plot works without running real MS data (faahKO, msdata, user’s urine files ../Mcourse_new/data/2023/incognito_urine_A_vs_C_pos).

what: THE performance story (most important thing here)
title: CLAUDE.md — working notes for xcmsVisGUI
text: Benchmarked: Spectra(MsBackendMzR()) / xcms::chromatogram() took 80–150 s/file real mzML. Root cause = BiocParallel: MsBackendMzR::backendInitialize reads headers via bplapply(files, ..., BPPARAM = bpparam()), Windows default SnowParam(6) — spawns socket cluster (worker reloading Bioc stack) per call. Fix: register(SerialParam()) → 0.2–1.6 s. Done .onLoad (R/zzz.R) every read path (app test suite) gets . Consequences baked architecture: - .onLoad (R/zzz.R) calls BiocParallel::register(SerialParam()). remove . (run_app() adds mirai daemon pool + large-upload option; daemons spawned package load.) - File-list header summaries read raw mzR (read_ms_header, ~0.1 s) mirai workers — even SerialParam Spectra reads ~5 s/file, slow 100+ files. Workers library(mzR) (BiocParallel). - Heavy plotting/filtering uses Spectra/xcms main process SerialParam (chromatogram, extract_peaks, extract_spectrum, filters). regains full Spectra filter set. - Git history preserves alternatives: Spectra baseline (commit Spectra/xcms baseline) pure-mzR version (commit Replace Spectra data layer direct mzR). Spectra fixes SnowParam default upstream, SerialParam workaround can dropped.

title: CLAUDE.md — working notes for xcmsVisGUI
text: R/run_app.R: app_ui() builds bslib page_navbar (sidebar Files (mod_ingest) + Filters (mod_filter); nav panels = plot modules); app_server() builds included (ticked + ready files), meta (id/name/path/group), data_key (paths + filter), cached raw_msexp (build_msexp, keyed path set) dataset (= apply_filters(raw)). run_app() runtime setup + shinyApp + runApp. Package layout (app-dir): global.R split R/zzz.R (.onLoad → SerialParam), R/constants.R (constants + rt helpers), R/daemons.R (set_daemons/setup_runtime). R/xcmsVisGUI-package.R holds roxygen import declarations; NAMESPACE/man/ roxygen-generated — don’t hand-edit. Central reactive state: make_rv() R/utils_reactive.R (rvfiles,rvfiles, rveic_targets, rvselection,rvselection, rvfilter, rv$settings). One rv passed every module. Modules (R/mod_*.R): one per plot + ingest/filter/settings/export. Plot modules return reactive ggplot plot_gg (export source truth) render ggplotly(plot_gg()). MS map plotly-native (scattergl/surface).

title: CLAUDE.md — working notes for xcmsVisGUI
text: Colours: ColorBrewer / viridis (user preference). Qualitative groups/traces, sequential maps. Honour rv$settings$invert_scale. Time: data always SECONDS internally; convert display/input edges rt_to_disp / rt_to_sec / rt_axis_label (unit = rv$settings$time_unit). Plotly click x display unit → convert back seconds rv$selection. Filters apply everywhere. Single-file views (spectrum, map) must go apply_filters_spectra intensity/spectrum-id/etc. reach — don’t read raw. Zoom persistence: use zoom_keeper(source) (captures plotly_relayout, re-applies range render) — uirevision hold zoom . Keep dynamicTicks=TRUE. Caching: heavy reactives use bindCache keyed data_key() (+ inputs). file_scan_table / .ms_cache cache per-file reads memory. Don’t key caches cosmetic inputs (colour, contrast, points) — breaks zoom wastes work. Cross-plot nav via rv$selection (list: plot, file_id, rt[sec], mz). plotly key = sample_id aesthetic carries file id click events. Heavy single-file views gated (MS map “Plot” button) don’t auto-render every change. Match surrounding code style: 2-space indent, <- assignment, roxygen-ish #' comments helpers, ggplot2::/Spectra:: namespacing fct_* (modules may use attached funcs). Keep comments , .

title: CLAUDE.md — working notes for xcmsVisGUI
text: mzR prints benign Rcpp ABI warning load — ignore (rebuilding mzR didn’t change ). mzR::openMSfile reads CDF , just mzML/mzXML. CDF headers carry m/z range (sentinel −1) unset polarity — mapped NA/blank. ggplot2 v4 (S7 objects) — don’t mutate aes() objects; build geoms conditionally. Don’t use PowerShell -strings (@'...'@) Bash tool — leak stray @. shinyFiles removed (users disliked custom modal); loading = typed path (copy) + native fileInput Browse (copies temp — documented trade-).

title: CLAUDE.md — working notes for xcmsVisGUI
text: Commit sequentially, one logical change per commit. End messages Co-Authored-: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>. Author Jan Stanstrup stanstrup@gmail.com.

title: Code review — xcmsVisGUI
text: Full read app.R, global.R, R/*.R, plus runtime check one filter path doubt. Date: 2026-06-05. Overall: good shape. architecture matches CLAUDE.md, SerialParam perf fix correctly centralized, cache keys sensible, seconds-internally / display-unit--edges discipline consistent. crashes security concerns (local single-user, injection vectors). Verified running real data (msdata): Spectra::filterMzRange() dispatch MsExperiment constrains correctly (110.001–119.999 110–120 window), unwrapped m/z filter apply_filters() fine — bug. Findings priority, file:line concrete fixes.

title: Code review — xcmsVisGUI
text: 1. Scan-list filters can materialize phantom blank rows — R/mod_plot_spectrum.R:187-199 filtered_scans() builds keep raw comparisons (keep & tab$polarity == pcode, keep & tab$precursorMZ >= sl$pmz_min, …). scan NA field (MS1 rows precursor m/z; vendors leave polarity unset), comparison yields NA, tab[keep, ] turns NA -NA row DT. Enabling precursor-m/z polarity filter can therefore sprinkle empty rows scan list. Fix: coerce NA→FALSE per clause, e.g. keep <- keep & !.na(tab$polarity) & tab$polarity == pcode, wrap numeric clause (…) %% TRUE. 2. “Reset filters” leaves MS level untouched — R/mod_filter.R:84-89 reset handler clears rt/mz/intensity, spectrum_id, polarity, ms_level select — reset MS-level constraint silently persists. Fix: add updateSelectInput(session, "ms_level", selected = ("1" %% ranges()$ms_levels) "1" else "").

title: Code review — xcmsVisGUI
text: 3. Single-file views re-open file every interaction — R/fct_extract.R:70-105,152-158 extract_spectrum / extract_peaks / extract_precursors call Spectra::Spectra(path, MsBackendMzR()) fresh. Spectrum tab re-initializes backend (header read) every rt/scan tweak; MS map / Precursors re-read included files render. Header tables cached .scan_cache (file_scan_table), Spectra object peak path uses . Fix: add small per-path Spectra-object cache (mirroring .scan_cache) slice . Biggest felt win Spectrum tab becoming interactive. 4. EIC cache key omits time unit — R/mod_plot_eic.R:141 eic_df bindCache(data_key(), enabled_targets()). Per-target rt_min/rt_max cells entered display unit converted seconds extraction. Flipping Settings min↔︎sec doesn’t change numeric cell values, cache doesn’t bust, now mean different unit → wrong rt window. Fix: add rv$settings$time_unit cache key.

title: Code review — xcmsVisGUI
text: 5. Stale library() loads — global.R:21-22,29-36 shinyFiles shinyWidgets zero call sites (shinyFiles removed; nothing uses widgets). stringr, fs, tidyr, purrr also show usage. shinyjs useShinyjs() actual shinyjs::* calls. Dropping (renv-setup.R:14) trims boot time lockfile. 6. Dead state/helpers — R/utils_reactive.R make_backend() (107) unused; rv$settings$backend never read written (backend selector removed); rv$active_file (41), rv$filter$charge (50), eic_targets$color (33) vestigial; included_file_ids() (100) unused (app.R inlines ). Trimming removes “wired ?” confusion. 7. Stale module comment — R/mod_ingest.R:1-7 Header still says files “picked server-side shinyFiles.” ’s now typed path + utils::choose.dir() + native fileInput. Update match.

title: Code review — xcmsVisGUI
text: 8. Inf leaking filter hints — R/fct_extract.R:23-24 -NA retention times (CDF edge), min/max(..., na.rm=TRUE) returns Inf/-Inf (warning suppressed), shows filter range hint. Coalesce non-finite NA.

title: Code review — xcmsVisGUI
text: 5/6/7 pure deletions (near-zero risk); 1 2 small real bugs; 3 perf win ’ll actually feel. separate commits main, parse-checked smoke-tested real data.

title: xcmsVisGUI — Implementation Plan
text: local Shiny desktop app — lightweight, raw-data-focused “mzMine viewer” — built RforMassSpectrometry stack (Spectra / MsExperiment / xcms) plotting delegated xcmsVis (gplot* → ggplot → plotly). Point mzML/mzXML/CDF files, explore interactively, filter richly, export publication-quality figures.

title: xcmsVisGUI — Implementation Plan
text: Six xcmsVis’s eleven gplot* functions need processed XcmsExperiment (detected peaks / features / RT alignment) run raw data. five raw-capable plots core (§7). peak/feature plots wired disabled tooltip, future Preprocess module (§16) lights without rework.

title: xcmsVisGUI — Implementation Plan
code: xcmsVisGUI/ ├── app.R                      # shinyApp(ui, server) — thin entry ├── global.R                   # library(), mirai daemons, conflicts, constants, palettes ├── R/ │   ├── mod_ingest.R           # shinyFiles + dropzone, ExtendedTask reader, file list + include checkboxes │   ├── mod_settings.R         # backend choice, palette, defaults, daemon count │   ├── mod_filter.R           # global rt/mz/msLevel/polarity/intensity filters │   ├── mod_plot_tic_bpc.R     # TIC/BPC, single + multi-file overlay │   ├── mod_plot_eic.R         # EIC list module (centerpiece) │   ├── mod_plot_spectrum.R    # click-driven spectrum view │   ├── mod_plot_msmap.R       # 2D heatmap (rt×mz×int) │   ├── mod_plot_3d.R          # 3D scatter/surface │   ├── mod_plot_precursors.R  # gplotPrecursorIons (DDA) │   ├── mod_export.R           # download modal: format/dpi/size │   ├── fct_extract.R          # Spectra/chromatogram helpers (run in mirai) │   ├── fct_filters.R          # compose Spectra filter* calls │   ├── fct_palettes.R         # ColorBrewer helpers │   └── utils_reactive.R       # shared reactiveVals / data model └── tests/                     # testServer() module tests + real-data smoke tests

title: xcmsVisGUI — Implementation Plan
text: single reactiveValues (rv), populated incrementally files finish loading: Plots read included files (rv$files$include) intersected active filter.
code: rv$files      # tibble: id, path, name, sample_group, include (logical),               #          status, n_spectra, rt_range, mz_range, ms_levels, polarities rv$msexp      # MsExperiment (on-disk), grows as files arrive rv$eic_targets# tibble: label, mz, tol, unit, rt_min, rt_max, color, enabled rv$selection  # last plotly_click: {plot, file_id, rt, mz} → drives spectrum rv$filter     # current global filter state rv$settings   # backend, palette, daemon count, default export size/dpi

title: xcmsVisGUI — Implementation Plan
text: File list (DT shinyWidgets) shows loaded file checkbox include/exclude plotting, plus status badge, n_spectra, rt/mz ranges, editable sample_group. “Select / none / invert” controls. Excluded files stay loaded (cheap, -disk) filtered every plot’s data source. sample_group drives ColorBrewer coloring overlay plots.

title: xcmsVisGUI — Implementation Plan
text: MsBackendMzR (default; -disk, low RAM, re-reads file) MsBackendMemory / setBackend(MsBackendMemory()) (fast re-plot, high RAM — good small data) MsBackendSql (SQLite-backed; scales many files, persistent) MsBackendHdf5Peaks (available; -disk peaks) Open question: gives best experience — benchmark real data build (§15). Global ColorBrewer palette choice (qualitative groups, sequential heatmaps/3D). Default export size/format/DPI. mirai daemon count. Intensity-threshold / bin-size defaults MS map & 3D.

title: xcmsVisGUI — Implementation Plan
text: Gated extension (disabled, raw-): gplotChromPeaks, gplotChromPeakImage, ghighlightChromPeaks, gplotChromPeakDensity, gplotFeatureGroups, gplotAdjustedRtime — wired disabled tooltip “requires Preprocess module” (§16).

title: xcmsVisGUI — Implementation Plan
text: mirai::daemons(n) global.R. Per file (incremental list fill): Header/summary read first → files appear fast; peak data stays -disk, pulled lazily. Workers return extracted data (tibbles), live -disk Spectra handles (handles don’t always cross process boundaries cleanly — see §17). read_task$status() drives per-file spinner/badge.
code: read_task <- ExtendedTask$new(function(path, backend) {   mirai::mirai({     sp <- Spectra::Spectra(path, source = backend)     list(path = path,          summary = list(n = length(sp),                         rt = range(Spectra::rtime(sp)),                         mz = range(unlist(Spectra::mz(sp))),                         ms = unique(Spectra::msLevel(sp)),                         pol = unique(Spectra::polarity(sp))))   }, path = path, backend = backend) })

Enabled rows overlay one gplotChromatogramsOverlay, colored per row via ColorBrewer; expose stacked offset transform=log1p toggles (already signature).

text: 2D MS-map heatmap always-default; 3D opt-current zoom window points/surface toggle + intensity-threshold/bin-size controls. Sequential ColorBrewer ramp.

title: xcmsVisGUI — Implementation Plan
text: Reuse mscurate’s event_data("plotly_click", source=...) pattern: click returns RT → nearest scan via rtime() → pull Spectra element → render geom_linerange spectrum linked card. Box-select spectrum can feed new EIC target back §9.

title: xcmsVisGUI — Implementation Plan
text: Global sidebar filters composed lazy Spectra/xcms calls: Plots inherit global filter; may set local override (e.g. zoom window MS map).

title: xcmsVisGUI — Implementation Plan
text: ggplot source truth; plotly -screen widget. module returns plot_gg (reactive ggplot) renders ggplotly(plot_gg()). “Save plot” modal: - Format: PNG / SVG / PDF - Size: width, height, units (/cm/mm/px) - PNG: DPI (72/150/300/600), scaling - Backend: ggsave(file, plot_gg(), device=…, dpi=…, width=…, height=…) - Optional: export interactive HTML via htmlwidgets::saveWidget.

title: xcmsVisGUI — Implementation Plan
text: Primary: shinyFiles picker → server-side paths, upload, multi-GB safe. Drag--drop dropzone convenience; browser DnD exposes contents paths, DnD’d files temp-copied read (fine small/medium). Document tradeoff UI.

title: xcmsVisGUI — Implementation Plan
text: Use xcmsVis’s example datasets (verify availability build): - faahKO CDF (MS1): dir(system.file("cdf", package = "faahKO"), recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE) - MsDataHub DDA mzML precursor ions: MsDataHub::PestMix1_DDA.mzML() - msdata package mzML files additional real samples. - readMsExperiment(spectraFiles = ...) build object. - Smoke tests: load → include/exclude → plot renders → export writes valid file. - Benchmark backend options (§6) faahKO pick sensible default.

what: 16. DEFERRED — Preprocessing (saved for later, do NOT build now)
title: xcmsVisGUI — Implementation Plan
text: current scope per user. Notes future mod_preprocess: - Steps: findChromPeaks (CentWave/MatchedFilter params UI) → groupChromPeaks (PeakDensity) → adjustRtime (Obiwarp/PeakGroups) → groupFeatures. - Run async (ExtendedTask + mirai); store processed XcmsExperiment alongside raw. - Unlocks six gated plots: gplotChromPeaks, gplotChromPeakImage, ghighlightChromPeaks (peak overlay EICs), gplotChromPeakDensity (param tuning), gplotFeatureGroups, gplotAdjustedRtime (alignment QC). - xcmsVis already working examples/vignettes six — copy data setup. - Param-tuning UX: gplotChromPeakDensity ideal interactive bw/minFraction tuning. - Pre-processed-data import (load existing processed XcmsExperiment/.rds) also deferred.

title: xcmsVisGUI — Implementation Plan
text: xcmsVis local package (CRAN/Bioc) — install local git path; pin via renv. Confirm route. gplot(XcmsExperiment) raw data: verify BPI/MS-map runs findChromPeaks. hard-requires peaks, extract TIC/MS-map directly Spectra skip xcmsVis . mirai + -disk Spectra: workers must return extracted data, live handles. (Plan assumes .) Best Spectra backend genuinely unknown — benchmark build (§6, §15).

title: xcmsVisGUI — Implementation Plan
text: Skeleton: app.R, global.R, bslib navbar, mod_ingest (shinyFiles + ExtendedTask/mirai), file list include checkboxes + live status. Settings tab: backend selector, palette. Core viz: TIC/BPC + EIC target table + Spectrum (click linkage). Filtering: global mod_filter. MS map + 3D. Precursor ions (DDA). Export modal. Polish: theming, drag-drop, caching, testServer + real-data smoke tests. (Later, deferred §16) Preprocess module → unlocks gated plots.

title: Using xcmsVisGUI
text: app exported function run_app(): browser tab opens five plot views across top (TIC/BPC, EIC, Spectrum, MS map, Precursors), Settings page, left sidebar Files Filters.
code: # installed: xcmsVisGUI::run_app()  # or from a clone (no install needed): # Rscript run.R

title: Using xcmsVisGUI
text: Open Files panel add data three ways — keep multi-GB files place (copy) except OS file browser: Paste folder file path click Add — loads every MS file folder (.mzML / .mzXML / .CDF). Choose folder… — native OS folder dialog (Windows), copy. Browse files… — OS file dialog; note copies chosen files temp folder. Files read asynchronously (status badge flips ⏳ ✅), UI stays responsive even many files. Tick file include plots — unticked files stay loaded. Use / None / Invert bulk selection. soon one file included, TIC renders:

title: Using xcmsVisGUI
text: Filters panel applies globally every view. Leave box blank limit; retention-time boxes use display unit (set Settings) data range shown hint. can constrain retention time, m/z, intensity, MS level, polarity, (vendor-specific subsetting) spectrum-ID substring. Reset filters clears .

title: Using xcmsVisGUI
text: first tab overlays total- (sum) base-peak (max) chromatogram every included file. Color sample sample group, optionally show data points, click trace jump scan’s spectrum Spectrum tab.

title: Using xcmsVisGUI
text: Add extracted-ion chromatogram targets table (one row per m/z), paste list m/z values click Add list. Tolerance ± half-window ppm Da (default set Settings). Traces overlaid across files coloured file, target, group; Facet file separates .

title: Using xcmsVisGUI
text: Enter retention time (acquisition scan number), arrive clicking chromatogram trace. Single file shows clicked file; Facet / Stacked compare included files retention time. Clicking peak adds m/z EIC target list. Scan list button opens searchable table every scan’s metadata (rt, MS level, polarity, precursor m/z, TIC, base peak, spectrum ID). Type filter boxes narrow , click row load scan.

title: Using xcmsVisGUI
text: 2-D m/z × retention-time map included files. draws exact centroids (binning) mzMine-style contrast control — lower contrast reveal weaker peaks. Press Plot render (gated never auto-extracts every file). Switch view 3D surface 3D points binned surface / scatter:

title: Using xcmsVisGUI
text: data-dependent acquisition, maps fragmented precursor ion (retention time × precursor m/z) across included MS2 files. Click point view spectrum.

title: Using xcmsVisGUI
text: Settings persist across restarts (stored per-user config directory): Retention-time unit — minutes seconds (applied everywhere; data always handled seconds internally). Palettes — ColorBrewer qualitative (traces/groups) viridis/sequential (maps); scale can inverted. EIC defaults — default tolerance value unit new targets. Parallel readers — mirai daemon-pool size async file reading. Export defaults — format (png/svg/pdf), size, units, DPI.

title: Using xcmsVisGUI
text: Every plot Save button exports crisp static image (png/svg/pdf via ggsave) underlying ggplot — independent -screen plotly — using size/format defaults Settings.

title: Interactive Raw LC-MS Viewer (Shiny)
text: local Shiny desktop app (packaged R package) interactively visualising raw LC-MS data RforMassSpectrometry stack (Spectra / MsExperiment / xcms). Plots ggplot2 rendered plotly interactivity (click, zoom, hover); static export via ggsave. See PLAN.md original design ARCHITECTURE_REVIEW.md current architecture.

title: Interactive Raw LC-MS Viewer (Shiny)
text: Working: async file ingestion, settings (ColorBrewer/viridis palette, retention-time unit, default EIC tolerance, export defaults — persisted across restarts), global filters (rt / m/z / MS level / polarity / intensity / spectrum-id), raw-data plot views — TIC/BPC, multi-EIC, click--spectrum (+ scan-list browser), 2D MS map, 3D (points/surface), DDA precursor ions. Scope raw visualisation — peak picking / grouping / alignment (deferred; PLAN.md §16).

title: Interactive Raw LC-MS Viewer (Shiny)
text: R package; app exported run_app().
code: # dev (from a clone, no install needed): Rscript run.R                       # = pkgload::load_all() + run_app(launch.browser = TRUE)  # or installed: xcmsVisGUI::run_app()

title: Interactive Raw LC-MS Viewer (Shiny)
text: Dockerfile (based Bioconductor image) runs app server: Open http://localhost:3838 paste /data (mounted files) Files box. Mount volume /root/.config/R persist settings across restarts.
code: docker build -t xcmsvisgui . docker run --rm -p 3838:3838 -v /path/to/ms-data:/data xcmsvisgui

title: Interactive Raw LC-MS Viewer (Shiny)
text: suite covers pure helpers key invariant apply_filters (MsExperiment) apply_filters_spectra (Spectra) select spectra. Real-data tests use msdata/faahKO Bioconductor packages skip absent. CI runs R CMD check push/PR (.github/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml).

title: Interactive Raw LC-MS Viewer (Shiny)
text: Dependencies pinned renv (renv.lock), Bioconductor support configured. fresh clone: renv-setup.R one-shot installer/snapshotter first-time setup.

title: Interactive Raw LC-MS Viewer (Shiny)
code: run.R                  # convenience launcher (load_all + run_app) DESCRIPTION / NAMESPACE # package metadata; NAMESPACE is roxygen-generated R/   run_app.R            # app_ui() / app_server() + exported run_app()   zzz.R                # .onLoad: register BiocParallel SerialParam (the perf fix)   constants.R          # MS-file constants, palette names, rt-unit helpers   daemons.R            # mirai daemon pool + per-run setup   xcmsVisGUI-package.R # roxygen import declarations + globalVariables   mod_ingest.R         # typed-path / choose.dir / fileInput + async mirai reader + file list   mod_settings.R       # palette, rt unit, default tolerance, daemon count, export; persistence   mod_filter.R         # global rt/mz/MS-level/polarity/intensity/spectrum-id filters   mod_plot_tic_bpc.R   # TIC/BPC overlay, colour by group/sample, click->spectrum   mod_plot_eic.R       # editable multi-m/z target table -> overlaid EICs   mod_plot_spectrum.R  # spectrum at a clicked rt / picked scan + scan-list browser   mod_plot_map.R       # 2D MS map + 3D points/surface (plotly-native)   mod_plot_precursors.R# DDA precursor-ion map   mod_export.R         # reusable png/svg/pdf export modal   fct_extract.R        # data extraction (summaries, chromatograms, peaks, spectra)   fct_filters.R        # compose filter state into Spectra/xcms calls   fct_export.R         # ggsave-based export   fct_palettes.R       # ColorBrewer / viridis helpers   fct_settings_store.R # persist settings to the per-user config dir   utils_reactive.R     # central reactive state (rv) + plotly/zoom helpers tests/testthat/        # unit + real-data tests

title: Launch xcmsVisGUI. — run_app
text: Performs one-time runtime setup (mirai daemon pool, large-upload option; SerialParam registered package load) starts Shiny app. daemon pool torn app stops.

title: Launch xcmsVisGUI. — run_app
text: ... passed shiny::runApp() (e.g. port, launch.browser).

title: Launch xcmsVisGUI. — run_app
text: Invisibly, result shiny::runApp().

what: xcmsVisGUI: interactive raw LC-MS viewer (Shiny) — xcmsVisGUI-package
title: xcmsVisGUI: interactive raw LC-MS viewer (Shiny) — xcmsVisGUI-package
text: local desktop Shiny app visualising raw LC-MS data (TIC/BPC, EICs, spectra, 2D/3D MS maps, DDA precursors). Launch run_app().

title: xcmsVisGUI: interactive raw LC-MS viewer (Shiny) — xcmsVisGUI-package
text: Import policy: every used function declared per-function @importFrom code calls bare names. Two deliberate exceptions: shiny bslib imported whole (@import) — UI framework used essentially every function conflicts imports; enumerating per function adds noise, safety. RforMassSpectrometry S4 stack (Spectra/xcms/MsExperiment/BiocParallel/ mzR) called ::. packages export many overlapping generics (rtime, intensity, mz, filterMsLevel, spectra, ...) collide base (close, filter); :: keeps intended method source explicit dispatch unambiguous — "unresolvable conflict" case. %>% (magrittr) %||% (rlang) imported operators.

title: xcmsVisGUI: interactive raw LC-MS viewer (Shiny) — xcmsVisGUI-package
